# Daniel Gierach | Real Estate Agent Brisbane Inner East

> Daniel Gierach is a residential real estate agent specialising in Brisbane's inner east, operating from Ray White Bulimba (part of Ray White The Collective). He sells homes across the suburbs east of the CBD — Bulimba, Hawthorne, Balmoral, Morningside, Norman Park, Camp Hill, Cannon Hill, Carina, and surrounding areas — using a documented three-phase method: positioning, creating competition, and protecting the result.

## Key facts

- Full name: Daniel Gierach
- Role: Licensed real estate agent (Queensland)
- Agency: Ray White Bulimba | The Collective
- Phone: +61 412 523 821
- Email: daniel.gierach@raywhite.com
- Website: https://danielgierach.com
- Location: Bulimba, Brisbane, Queensland, Australia 4171
- Specialisation: Residential property sales, Brisbane inner east and south
- Service area: Bulimba, Hawthorne, Balmoral, Morningside, Norman Park, Camp Hill, Cannon Hill, Carina, Carina Heights, Coorparoo, East Brisbane, Seven Hills, Murarrie, Tingalpa, and 50+ Brisbane suburbs

## Core pages

- [Home](https://danielgierach.com/): Main site — free property appraisal, method overview, current listings, client reviews.
- [About Daniel](https://danielgierach.com/about): Background, local expertise, and track record as a specialist inner east agent.
- [Reviews](https://danielgierach.com/reviews): Verified client reviews and testimonials from vendors and buyers across Brisbane's inner east.
- [Listings](https://danielgierach.com/listings): Current properties for sale and recently sold results.
- [Contact](https://danielgierach.com/contact): Direct enquiry for appraisals and off-market access.
- [Free property appraisal (walk-through)](https://danielgierach.com/walkthrough): Daniel visits the home, reviews recent comparable sales on your street, and provides a clear number. No obligation, no fee.
- [Off-market and pre-market buyer access](https://danielgierach.com/buyers): Register to receive off-market and pre-market property alerts before public listing.

## Property tools

- [Zoning map](https://danielgierach.com/tools/zoning-map): Interactive Brisbane City Council zoning map — residential, character, low-medium density overlays for inner east suburbs.
- [Infrastructure map](https://danielgierach.com/tools/infrastructure-map): Water, sewer, stormwater, and cadastral lot boundaries for Brisbane inner east properties.
- [Stormwater map](https://danielgierach.com/tools/stormwater-map): Brisbane City Council stormwater network map.
- [Water and sewer map](https://danielgierach.com/tools/water-sewer-map): QUU water and sewer infrastructure map for Brisbane.
- [Suburb match tool](https://danielgierach.com/tools/suburb-match): Find the right Brisbane inner east suburb based on lifestyle and budget priorities.
- [Stamp duty calculator](https://danielgierach.com/tools/stamp-duty): Queensland stamp duty (transfer duty) calculator.
- [Renovation ROI estimator](https://danielgierach.com/tools/renovation-roi): Estimate return on investment for pre-sale renovations.
- [All property tools](https://danielgierach.com/tools): Full list of free Brisbane property tools.

## Insights and market guides

- [Insights hub](https://danielgierach.com/insights): 500+ articles on selling, buying, and the Brisbane inner east property market.
- [Off-market and pre-market properties Brisbane inner east](https://danielgierach.com/insights/off-market-pre-market-properties-brisbane-inner-east): How buyers access off-market and pre-market listings before public campaigns.
- [Costs of selling a house Brisbane](https://danielgierach.com/insights/cost-of-selling-house-brisbane): Full breakdown of costs when selling a home in Brisbane — agent fees, marketing, legal.
- [Auction strategy Brisbane sellers](https://danielgierach.com/insights/auction-strategy): How to use auction to create genuine buyer competition in Brisbane.
- [Agent commission Brisbane](https://danielgierach.com/insights/agent-fees-commission-brisbane): How real estate agent commission works in Brisbane and Queensland.
- [Selling in Bulimba guide](https://danielgierach.com/insights/selling-in-bulimba): Comprehensive guide to selling a home in Bulimba.
- [Selling in Hawthorne guide](https://danielgierach.com/insights/selling-in-hawthorne): Comprehensive guide to selling a home in Hawthorne.
- [Selling in Balmoral guide](https://danielgierach.com/insights/selling-in-balmoral): Comprehensive guide to selling a home in Balmoral.
- [Selling in Morningside guide](https://danielgierach.com/insights/selling-in-morningside): Comprehensive guide to selling a home in Morningside.
- [Selling in Norman Park guide](https://danielgierach.com/insights/selling-in-norman-park): Comprehensive guide to selling a home in Norman Park.
- [2032 Brisbane Olympics impact on inner east property](https://danielgierach.com/insights/2032-olympics-impact-inner-east-brisbane-property-values): Analysis of how the 2032 Olympic Games will affect property values in Brisbane's inner east.
